privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated trajectory in CoppeliaSim. It has been verified that the expected output paths (/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dynamics_profile.csv and dynamics_report.json), the velocity limit (180°/s), the acceleration limit (800°/s²), the minimum waypoint count (6), the minimum sample count (100), and the minimum joint motion range (45°) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description, as well as the evaluation logic in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
